title: bilabrella myodes
side_effects: Bilabrella myodes can have side effects if used improperly, such as rapid heartbeat, nausea, and dizziness due to its high concentration of myodeine. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can also lead to respiratory problems, including shortness of breath and asthma attacks. In severe cases, misuse of Bilabrella myodes can cause liver and kidney damage, as well as gastrointestinal issues like diarrhea and stomach ulcers. If not handled correctly, the plant's extracts can be toxic, resulting in seizures, coma, or even death in extreme circumstances.
